d17ba6a4e877.film_stock: B&W digital composite across multiple sources
d17ba6a4e877.lighting: mixed — gala stage, tarmac daylight, villa dusk, garage fluorescent
d17ba6a4e877.composition: 6-panel collage grid (3 wide x 2 tall) layout on 16:9 canvas, each cell a different luxury/prestige clip: gala crowd, Porsche interior, Porsche wheel, estate driveway with Cayenne, woman in fur entering SUV, fur-coated woman descending steps from private jet. Serif '$MOTION' overlay centered across the middle
d17ba6a4e877.color_palette: pure B&W, high contrast, preserved mid-tones
d17ba6a4e877.subject: six-panel grid of luxury vignettes (gala entrance, Porsche cockpit, Porsche steering wheel with Cayenne shield, Lambo at estate, woman in fur at Rolls, fur coat descending private jet steps)
d17ba6a4e877.notes: NEW FORMAT DISCOVERED: multi-panel collage grid; editor uses this when a single shot can't carry the narrative; typically B&W to unify disparate source material

7ef6c9ee076c.lighting: blue-hour ambient + warm practical from hangar strip
7ef6c9ee076c.composition: centered front 3/4 of two Rolls Royces parked at hangar-style warehouse, symmetrical composition with black Rolls left and white Rolls Spectre right, vertical 9:16, serif text overlay centered with footer credit 'AUVIROX'
7ef6c9ee076c.color_palette: cool steel blue dominant, warm corrugated-red hangar accent, crushed blacks
7ef6c9ee076c.subject: two Rolls Royce cars parked at a warehouse / hangar (black widebody coupe + white Rolls Royce Spectre EV)
7ef6c9ee076c.notes: creator attribution 'AUVIROX' — different editor from STAYBLESSED; same brand treatment but this editor leans into cars + architectural symmetry

2c5f1ab94c19.film_stock: B&W digital, soft grain, clean mid-tones
2c5f1ab94c19.lighting: talk-show interior warm key + skyline window fill, soft diffusion
2c5f1ab94c19.composition: medium 3/4 of young man laughing and gesturing, sitting at talk-show desk with mic and Monster energy can, city skyline photo as backdrop left, potted plant right, bold geometric sans 'MOTION' text bleeding off left edge, '4F' footer logo
2c5f1ab94c19.subject: young man in suit and tie on a late-night-style talk show, mid-laugh, holding a Monster energy can
2c5f1ab94c19.location_type: late-night talk show set, period-styled or nostalgic

c93a2ed72a79.film_stock: B&W lo-fi phone video, grainy in shadow
c93a2ed72a79.lighting: ceiling room-light overhead, slight backlight from doorway
c93a2ed72a79.composition: medium close-up of a bearded man in hoodie sitting on a bed, 3/4 to camera, bedroom interior with closet and bed visible behind, 16:9 landscape, college-varsity-style outlined badge 'WHITE BOY MOTION' bottom-right
c93a2ed72a79.color_palette: B&W lo-fi, lifted blacks, blown whites, low contrast
c93a2ed72a79.subject: middle-aged bearded man in hoodie on bed, looking at camera with resigned/fed-up expression
c93a2ed72a79.notes: third creator brand: 'WHITE BOY MOTION' styled as varsity-badge overlay; UGC-phone-video aesthetic shows the brand covers BOTH cinematic curation AND raw personal content

b8636c72316a.film_stock: digital action cam / DSLR, clean color
b8636c72316a.lighting: direct overhead sun, hard highlights on wave crest
b8636c72316a.composition: medium-wide 16:9, surfer carving centered in wave face, massive whitewater spray filling frame behind and above, serif text overlay centered
b8636c72316a.color_palette: saturated ocean blues + pure white spray + wetsuit black, high contrast
b8636c72316a.subject: professional surfer in black wetsuit carving a cutback on a head-high wave, blonde wet hair
b8636c72316a.location_type: ocean surf break, offshore wind conditions
b8636c72316a.notes: sports photography aesthetic; clean and vibrant vs. the editor's more common grainy/degraded look — signals an aspirational/health-coded piece

46b3c3a2375c.film_stock: digital cinema, filmic roll-off, heavy atmospheric haze
46b3c3a2375c.lighting: strong volumetric backlight from doorway, heavy haze/fog revealing light beams
46b3c3a2375c.composition: centered silhouette of figure walking away down a corridor into bright doorway, volumetric god-rays spilling out, 4:5 portrait, serif text overlay centered on subject
46b3c3a2375c.color_palette: cool teal-blue monochrome with warm white light source, near-black foreground silhouette
46b3c3a2375c.subject: silhouetted muscular figure walking away from camera into bright doorway, arena-tunnel vibe
46b3c3a2375c.notes: heroic-figure-walks-into-light is a pattern; recurring dramatic-exit/entrance composition; teal-blue + warm highlight is distinctive palette

58555247ac2e.lighting: bright surface sunlight penetrating shallow water
58555247ac2e.composition: underwater medium shot, bull shark swimming laterally across mid-frame, white sand bottom filling lower third, clear blue water upper 2/3, conch shell foreground anchor, 16:9 landscape, serif text overlay centered
58555247ac2e.color_palette: bright saturated tropical blues + bone white sand + mid-gray shark, high-saturation daylight
58555247ac2e.subject: bull shark cruising along sandy shallow bottom, conch shell in foreground
58555247ac2e.notes: second predator-wildlife-doc piece (lion + shark); editor treats apex-predator footage as canonical brand imagery; clean high-sat color breaks the B&W default for predators

04bbdb63b058.composition: vertical 9:16, infinity-pool loungers foreground, bay + skyline mid-ground with Monte Carlo skyscrapers, mountains in haze upper-third, DARK-NAVY serif text overlay (not white!) centered
